mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.part_name, s.part_code, s.model_id, s.warehouse_id, s.status, s.quantity, s.create_time, m.model_name, w.warehouse_name FROM spare_part s LEFT JOIN device_model m ON m.id = s.model_id AND m.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON w.id = s.warehouse_id AND w.deleted = 0 WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0
